title: Template
text: Template A Template is a Development Object that provides a blueprint for creating new objects. It defines properties and code containers that are copied to a newly-created object. There is no inheritance from the template to an object that was created with the template. The template simply provides a reusable pattern that can be used to quickly define new objects that require that pattern. Uniface provides a default set of templates for all its Development Objects. These are made available in the Resource Browser of the applicable editor. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: — Main Development Object?
